mapper.select: SELECT P.PROJECT_ID AS projectId, P.PROJECT_NAME AS projectDisplayName, R.PROJECT_RUNTIME_VERSION AS activeRuntimeVersion, R.COMMON_ARTIFACT_SET_JSON AS commonArtifactSet, R.ADAPTER_CONTRACT_VERSION AS activeAdapterContractVersion, R.ADAPTER_ARTIFACT_VERSION AS activeAdapterArtifactVersion, R.ROLLBACK_TARGET_RELEASE_ID AS rollbackReadyReleaseUnitId FROM PROJECT_REGISTRY P LEFT JOIN RELEASE_UNIT_REGISTRY R ON R.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID WHERE P.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY R.BUILT_AT DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT PROJECT_ID AS projectId, PROJECT_ID AS projectCode, '' AS deploymentTarget FROM PROJECT_REGISTRY WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} LIMIT 1

SELECT A.ARTIFACT_ID AS artifactId, A.ARTIFACT_FAMILY AS artifactFamily, A.ARTIFACT_VERSION AS installedArtifactVersion, I.INSTALL_SCOPE AS installScope, CASE WHEN I.ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS activeYn FROM PROJECT_ARTIFACT_INSTALL I JOIN ARTIFACT_VERSION_REGISTRY A ON A.ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID = I.ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID WHERE I.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY I.INSTALLED_AT DESC
SELECT PACKAGE_ID AS packageId, MODULE_TYPE AS packageType, MODULE_VERSION AS installedVersion FROM INSTALL_UNIT WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY UPDATED_AT DESC

SELECT RECORDED_AT AS recordedAt, ADAPTER_CONTRACT_VERSION AS adapterContractVersion, ADAPTER_ARTIFACT_VERSION AS adapterArtifactVersion, COMPATIBILITY_CLASS AS compatibilityClass, CASE WHEN MIGRATION_REQUIRED_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS migrationRequiredYn, CHANGED_PORT_SET_JSON AS changedPortSet, CHANGED_DTO_SET_JSON AS changedDtoSet, MAPPING_IMPACT_SUMMARY AS mappingImpactSummary, RELATED_RELEASE_UNIT_ID AS relatedReleaseUnitId FROM ADAPTER_CHANGE_LOG WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY RECORDED_AT DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT RELEASE_UNIT_ID AS releaseUnitId, RUNTIME_PACKAGE_ID AS runtimePackageId, PROJECT_RUNTIME_VERSION AS projectRuntimeVersion, ADAPTER_ARTIFACT_VERSION AS adapterArtifactVersion, ADAPTER_CONTRACT_VERSION AS adapterContractVersion, COMMON_ARTIFACT_SET_JSON AS commonArtifactSet, PACKAGE_VERSION_SET_JSON AS packageVersionSet, BUILT_AT AS builtAt, APPROVED_AT AS approvedAt, ROLLBACK_TARGET_RELEASE_ID AS rollbackTargetReleaseId FROM RELEASE_UNIT_REGISTRY WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY BUILT_AT DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ARTIFACT_VERSION_REGISTRY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROJECT_ARTIFACT_INSTALL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RELEASE_UNIT_REGISTRY

SELECT S.SERVER_ID AS serverId, COALESCE(S.SERVER_ROLE, '') AS serverRole, S.RELEASE_UNIT_ID AS activeReleaseUnitId, S.DEPLOY_TRACE_ID AS deployTraceId, S.DEPLOYED_AT AS deployedAt, S.HEALTH_STATUS AS healthStatus, 0 AS runtimeTruthYn FROM SERVER_DEPLOYMENT_STATE S WHERE S.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SERVER_DEPLOYMENT_STATE S2 WHERE S2.PROJECT_ID = S.PROJECT_ID AND S2.SERVER_ID = S.SERVER_ID AND ( S2.DEPLOYED_AT > S.DEPLOYED_AT OR ( S2.DEPLOYED_AT = S.DEPLOYED_AT AND S2.SERVER_DEPLOYMENT_ID > S.SERVER_DEPLOYMENT_ID ) ) ) ORDER BY S.DEPLOYED_AT DESC

SELECT A.ARTIFACT_ID AS artifactId, A.ARTIFACT_FAMILY AS artifactFamily, A.ARTIFACT_VERSION AS artifactVersion, A.ADAPTER_CONTRACT_VERSION AS adapterContractVersion, A.API_CONTRACT_VERSION AS apiContractVersion, A.MANIFEST_CONTRACT_VERSION AS manifestContractVersion, A.CAPABILITY_CATALOG_VERSION AS capabilityCatalogVersion, A.PUBLISHED_AT AS publishedAt, CASE WHEN I.ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS installedYn FROM ARTIFACT_VERSION_REGISTRY A LEFT JOIN PROJECT_ARTIFACT_INSTALL I ON I.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} AND I.ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID = A.ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID WHERE A.ARTIFACT_ID IN ( SELECT DISTINCT A2.ARTIFACT_ID FROM PROJECT_ARTIFACT_INSTALL I2 JOIN ARTIFACT_VERSION_REGISTRY A2 ON A2.ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID = I2.ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID WHERE I2.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ) ORDER BY A.ARTIFACT_ID ASC, A.PUBLISHED_AT DESC, A.ARTIFACT_VERSION DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ARTIFACT_VERSION_REGISTRY A WHERE A.ARTIFACT_ID IN ( SELECT DISTINCT A2.ARTIFACT_ID FROM PROJECT_ARTIFACT_INSTALL I2 JOIN ARTIFACT_VERSION_REGISTRY A2 ON A2.ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID = I2.ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID WHERE I2.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} )

SELECT PROJECT_ID AS projectId, RELEASE_UNIT_ID AS releaseUnitId, GROUP_ID AS groupId, ARTIFACT_ID AS artifactId, ARTIFACT_VERSION AS artifactVersion, ARTIFACT_SHA256 AS artifactSha256, LOCK_SOURCE AS lockSource, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM ARTIFACT_LOCK WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC, RELEASE_UNIT_ID DESC, ARTIFACT_ID ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT RUN_ID AS runId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, SOURCE_RELEASE_UNIT_ID AS sourceReleaseUnitId, TARGET_COMMON_VERSION AS targetCommonVersion, BUILD_STATUS AS buildStatus, ADAPTER_CONTRACT_STATUS AS adapterContractStatus, DB_DIFF_STATUS AS dbDiffStatus, SMOKE_STATUS AS smokeStatus, COMPATIBILITY_STATUS AS compatibilityStatus, BLOCKING_REASON AS blockingReason, ROLLBACK_RELEASE_UNIT_ID AS rollbackReleaseUnitId, TESTED_AT AS testedAt, TESTED_BY AS testedBy FROM PROJECT_COMPATIBILITY_RUN WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY TESTED_AT DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID AS artifactVersionId, ARTIFACT_ID AS artifactId, ARTIFACT_FAMILY AS artifactFamily, ARTIFACT_VERSION AS artifactVersion, CHECKSUM_SHA256 AS checksumSha256, ADAPTER_CONTRACT_VERSION AS adapterContractVersion, API_CONTRACT_VERSION AS apiContractVersion, MANIFEST_CONTRACT_VERSION AS manifestContractVersion, CAPABILITY_CATALOG_VERSION AS capabilityCatalogVersion FROM ARTIFACT_VERSION_REGISTRY WHERE ARTIFACT_ID = #{artifactId} AND ARTIFACT_VERSION = #{artifactVersion} LIMIT 1

SELECT I.PROJECT_ARTIFACT_INSTALL_ID AS projectArtifactInstallId, A.ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID AS artifactVersionId, A.ARTIFACT_ID AS artifactId, A.ARTIFACT_FAMILY AS artifactFamily, A.ARTIFACT_VERSION AS installedArtifactVersion, I.INSTALL_SCOPE AS installScope, I.RELEASE_UNIT_ID AS releaseUnitId, I.ROLLBACK_TARGET_VERSION AS rollbackTargetVersion FROM PROJECT_ARTIFACT_INSTALL I JOIN ARTIFACT_VERSION_REGISTRY A ON A.ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID = I.ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID WHERE I.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} AND I.ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' AND A.ARTIFACT_ID = #{artifactId} ORDER BY I.INSTALLED_AT DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT RELEASE_UNIT_ID AS releaseUnitId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, RUNTIME_PACKAGE_ID AS runtimePackageId, PROJECT_RUNTIME_VERSION AS projectRuntimeVersion, ADAPTER_ARTIFACT_VERSION AS adapterArtifactVersion, ADAPTER_CONTRACT_VERSION AS adapterContractVersion, COMMON_ARTIFACT_SET_JSON AS commonArtifactSet, PACKAGE_VERSION_SET_JSON AS packageVersionSet, ROLLBACK_TARGET_RELEASE_ID AS rollbackTargetReleaseId FROM RELEASE_UNIT_REGISTRY WHERE RELEASE_UNIT_ID = #{releaseUnitId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE PROJECT_ARTIFACT_INSTALL SET ACTIVE_YN = 'N' WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} AND ACTIVE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RELEASE_UNIT_REGISTRY ( RELEASE_UNIT_ID, PROJECT_ID, RUNTIME_PACKAGE_ID, PROJECT_RUNTIME_VERSION, ADAPTER_ARTIFACT_VERSION, ADAPTER_CONTRACT_VERSION, COMMON_ARTIFACT_SET_JSON, PACKAGE_VERSION_SET_JSON, ROLLBACK_TARGET_RELEASE_ID, BUILT_AT, APPROVED_AT, APPROVED_BY ) VALUES ( #{releaseUnitId}, #{projectId}, #{runtimePackageId}, #{projectRuntimeVersion}, #{adapterArtifactVersion}, #{adapterContractVersion}, #{commonArtifactSetJson}, #{packageVersionSetJson}, #{rollbackTargetReleaseId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{approvedBy} )

INSERT INTO PROJECT_ARTIFACT_INSTALL ( PROJECT_ARTIFACT_INSTALL_ID, PROJECT_ID, ARTIFACT_VERSION_ID, INSTALL_SCOPE, RELEASE_UNIT_ID, ACTIVE_YN, ROLLBACK_TARGET_VERSION, INSTALLED_AT, INSTALLED_BY ) VALUES ( #{projectArtifactInstallId}, #{projectId}, #{artifactVersionId}, #{installScope}, #{releaseUnitId}, 'Y', #{rollbackTargetVersion}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{installedBy} )

INSERT INTO ADAPTER_CHANGE_LOG ( ADAPTER_CHANGE_ID, PROJECT_ID, ADAPTER_ARTIFACT_VERSION, ADAPTER_CONTRACT_VERSION, CHANGED_PORT_SET_JSON, CHANGED_DTO_SET_JSON, MAPPING_IMPACT_SUMMARY, COMPATIBILITY_CLASS, MIGRATION_REQUIRED_YN, RELATED_RELEASE_UNIT_ID, RECORDED_AT, RECORDED_BY ) VALUES ( #{adapterChangeId}, #{projectId}, #{adapterArtifactVersion}, #{adapterContractVersion}, #{changedPortSetJson}, #{changedDtoSetJson}, #{mappingImpactSummary}, #{compatibilityClass}, #{migrationRequiredYn}, #{relatedReleaseUnitId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{recordedBy} )

INSERT INTO SERVER_DEPLOYMENT_STATE ( SERVER_DEPLOYMENT_ID, SERVER_ID, SERVER_ROLE, PROJECT_ID, RELEASE_UNIT_ID, DEPLOY_TRACE_ID, HEALTH_STATUS, DEPLOYED_AT, DEPLOYED_BY ) VALUES ( #{serverDeploymentId}, #{serverId}, #{serverRole}, #{projectId}, #{releaseUnitId}, #{deployTraceId}, #{healthStatus}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{deployedBy} )

INSERT INTO ARTIFACT_LOCK ( PROJECT_ID, RELEASE_UNIT_ID, GROUP_ID, ARTIFACT_ID, ARTIFACT_VERSION, ARTIFACT_SHA256, LOCK_SOURCE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{releaseUnitId}, #{groupId}, #{artifactId}, #{artifactVersion}, #{artifactSha256}, #{lockSource}, CURRENT_DATETIME )

INSERT INTO PROJECT_COMPATIBILITY_RUN ( RUN_ID, PROJECT_ID, SOURCE_RELEASE_UNIT_ID, TARGET_COMMON_VERSION, BUILD_STATUS, ADAPTER_CONTRACT_STATUS, DB_DIFF_STATUS, SMOKE_STATUS, COMPATIBILITY_STATUS, BLOCKING_REASON, ROLLBACK_RELEASE_UNIT_ID, TESTED_AT, TESTED_BY ) VALUES ( #{runId}, #{projectId}, #{sourceReleaseUnitId}, #{targetCommonVersion}, #{buildStatus}, #{adapterContractStatus}, #{dbDiffStatus}, #{smokeStatus}, #{compatibilityStatus}, #{blockingReason}, #{rollbackReleaseUnitId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{testedBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT DEPLOYMENT_HISTORY_ID AS deploymentHistoryId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, RELEASE_VERSION AS releaseVersion, RELEASE_TITLE AS releaseTitle, RELEASE_CONTENT AS releaseContent, STATUS AS status, SERVER_TARGET AS serverTarget, RELEASE_UNIT_ID AS releaseUnitId, DEPLOY_TRACE_ID AS deployTraceId, GIT_COMMIT_SHA AS gitCommitSha, RESULT_MESSAGE AS resultMessage, STARTED_AT AS startedAt, FINISHED_AT AS finishedAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, CREATED_BY AS createdBy FROM PROJECT_DEPLOYMENT_HISTORY WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY STARTED_AT DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PROJECT_DEPLOYMENT_HISTORY ( DEPLOYMENT_HISTORY_ID, PROJECT_ID, RELEASE_VERSION, RELEASE_TITLE, RELEASE_CONTENT, STATUS, SERVER_TARGET, RELEASE_UNIT_ID, DEPLOY_TRACE_ID, GIT_COMMIT_SHA, RESULT_MESSAGE, STARTED_AT, UPDATED_AT, CREATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{deploymentHistoryId}, #{projectId}, #{releaseVersion}, #{releaseTitle}, #{releaseContent, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{serverTarget}, #{releaseUnitId}, #{deployTraceId}, #{gitCommitSha}, #{resultMessage}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{createdBy} )
